name: Matrix
summary: The Matrix class represents a 4x3 matrix.

constructors.name: Matrix
constructors.summary: Creates a new matrix which is a copy of the given matrix.

methods.name: GetTranspose
methods.summary: Returns a new matrix which is a transpose of the current matrix. The transposed matrix is an inversion of the current matrix, if the current matrix was a valid rotation matrix.

methods.name: ToString
methods.summary: Returns a string that represents the current matrix.

methods.name: Transform(IEnumerable.Point.)
methods.summary: Transforms the given points using the current matrix.

methods.name: Transform(Point)
methods.summary: Transforms the given point using the current matrix.

methods.name: Transpose
methods.summary: Transposes a matrix. The resulting matrix is an inversion of the current matrix, if the current matrix was a valid rotation matrix.

properties.name: Item
properties.summary: Sets or gets the matrix element values.
